rationale: Dhampur Green is an FMCG/Agri brand (sugar/sweeteners). We need a high-density B2B sales dashboard that feels premium and trustworthy. We avoid the clinical 'SaaS Blue' and instead use a 'Control Room' dense layout styled with deep forest greens, warm jaggery/terracotta accents, and off-white/bone backgrounds. This creates an authoritative yet grounded emotional tone.

rules: Overlines and labels must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].
No generic Inter for headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk for a slightly architectural/structured corporate feel.
Maintain a 2-step maximum jump in Tailwind typography scale between H1 and H2 (e.g., text-3xl to text-xl).
Use dense, compact spacing for tables and lists (p-2, p-3).
Dashboard widgets should use col-span-1 for summaries, col-span-2 or 3 for charts.
Eliminate large gaps in data-heavy areas: use gap-4 or gap-6 maximum.
Instead of floaty shadow cards, use flat surfaces with 1px border-border and rounded-md or rounded-none for a crisp, technical look.
Sidebar should be fixed width (e.g., 260px) with dark green background (#143628) for high contrast framing against the light content area.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px solid border (#DCE1D9), no shadows by default. Slight lift (-translate-y-[1px]) and shadow-sm on hover.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#143628] text-white. Use earthy terracotta (#B85C38) ONLY for critical/high-priority CTAs (like 'Generate AI Email' or 'High Priority Lead').
components.badges: Use tinted backgrounds: Qualified = bg-[#143628]/10 text-[#143628], High Priority = bg-[#B85C38]/10 text-[#B85C38].
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Remove outer borders if within a card. Ensure text-sm for density.
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use deep green (#143628), sage (#8FA39A), and jaggery (#B85C38) for data series. No default vibrant blue/purple.

images.description: Abstract green and gold textured background for Login/Auth screen.
Warm modern cafe interior to be used as a stylized empty state or header image for HORECA leads.
Professional corporate headshot for the logged-in sales rep/manager profile.

icons.rules: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a sophisticated, clean look. Do not use overly thick icons.

testing.attributes: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tr rows, tabs, select items) MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based (e.g., data-testid='upload-csv-button').

pages_and_features.dashboard_overview: Use 'Control Room' grid. KPI cards at the top (col-span-1 each). Main area split into 'Lead Pipeline Map' (col-span-2) and 'Recent Activity/High Priority Feed' (col-span-1).
pages_and_features.lead_discovery: Clean search interface. When showing the API fetch or CSV upload, use a dashed 1px border area (bg-muted) with the cafe abstract image faintly in the background or alongside.
pages_and_features.lead_database: Dense Shadcn Table. Include a specific column for 'AI Score' represented by a small colored progress bar (Green for >80, Terracotta for <50).
pages_and_features.lead_detail: Bento grid layout. Left column (narrow): Contact Info, Labels. Right column (wide): AI Qualification Reasoning, Outreach Center, Email Drafts.
pages_and_features.outreach_center: Display AI-generated email inside a 'Terminal/Text-editor' styled block: font-mono text-sm bg-[#F4F5F0] border border-border p-4 rounded-md. Button to 'Regenerate' or 'Send' directly below.
